description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine ReadCapCurves,GCAP_2, and is implemented by a call to ReadCapCurves,GCAP_2. Use this API to read a data file containing capability curve data and print a report of machine loading and limit data (activity GCAP). Optionally, machine reactive power limits in the working case may be updated. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = gcap(sid, all, opt, gfile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: opt
parameters.description: Update var limits option. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: gfile
parameters.description: Machine capability data file. (input; no default allowed).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

opt.description: update var limits in the working case.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
